tools.name: rubrkit_search_api_docs
tools.description: Search the canonical docs/api Markdown guides and OpenAPI operation summaries.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_api_doc
tools.description: Read a docs/api Markdown guide or OpenAPI source by slug, file name, or docs/api path.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_openapi_contract
tools.description: Read the canonical docs/api/openapi.yaml contract.

tools.name: rubrkit_create_artifact_bundle
tools.description: Create an artifact bundle through /api/v1/artifact-bundles. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_artifact_bundles
tools.description: List artifact bundles through /api/v1/artifact-bundles. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_artifact_bundle
tools.description: Read artifact bundle details, files, and file tree. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_delete_artifact_bundle
tools.description: Archive an artifact bundle (soft delete) through DELETE /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}. The bundle moves to the archived state and can be restored or permanently deleted later. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_hard_delete_artifact_bundle
tools.description: Permanently delete an archived artifact bundle and all of its files, versions, and run history through DELETE /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/permanent. This is irreversible and only works on bundles that are already archived. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_upload_artifact_files
tools.description: Upload one or more text files into an artifact bundle. Requires files:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_artifact_files
tools.description: List files in an artifact bundle. Requires files:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_artifact_file
tools.description: Read the latest file metadata and content. Requires files:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_update_artifact_file
tools.description: Write a new editable version for a file. Requires files:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_start_audit
tools.description: Start an async audit job. Audit results are cached per account by a content hash of their inputs; pass force: true to bypass the cache and run a fresh audit (the same as the CLI's --no-cache flag). Requires audits:run for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_audits
tools.description: List persisted audit history. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_audit
tools.description: Read a single audit run. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_apply_audit_rewrite
tools.description: Apply a completed audit's AI rewrite to the bundle files (a new version per changed file). Requires audits:run for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_convert_to_rubr_flow
tools.description: Start an async rubr_flow conversion job. Requires rubr_flow:convert for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_rubr_flow_conversions
tools.description: List conversion history. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_rubr_flow_conversion
tools.description: Read one conversion report. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_poll_job
tools.description: Read async job progress. Requires jobs:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_job_events
tools.description: Read append-only job progress events. Requires jobs:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_artifact_bundle_versions
tools.description: List bundle-level version events. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_restore_artifact_bundle_version
tools.description: Restore files from a prior artifact-bundle version by creating new file versions. Requires artifact_bundles:write and files:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_file_versions
tools.description: List immutable versions for a file. Requires files:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_restore_file_version
tools.description: Restore a prior file version by creating a new version. Requires files:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_run_evals
tools.description: Start an async eval run. Requires evals:run for API keys. Set mode: "advanced" with baselineVersionId and candidateVersionId to run a statistically-backed A/B (repeats defaults to 3, max 5).

tools.name: rubrkit_list_evals
tools.description: List eval history. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_eval
tools.description: Read one eval run, including the `stats` statistical verdict on advanced-mode runs (empty for standard runs). Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_export_proof_report
tools.description: Start an async proof report job with export storage enabled by default. Requires evals:run for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_proof_report
tools.description: Read one proof report. Requires artifact_bundles:read for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_golden_cases
tools.description: List the golden cases for an artifact bundle via /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/golden-cases. Requires artifact_bundles:read (or artifacts:pull) for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_add_golden_case
tools.description: Add a golden case (a real edge-case input with a confirmed-correct output) to an artifact bundle via POST /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/golden-cases. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_retire_golden_case
tools.description: Retire a golden case via DELETE /api/v1/golden-cases/{goldenCaseId}. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_create_drift_monitor
tools.description: Create a drift monitor pinned to a file version via POST /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/drift-monitors. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_list_drift_monitors
tools.description: List the drift monitors for an artifact bundle via /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/drift-monitors. Requires artifact_bundles:read (or artifacts:pull) for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_drift_observations
tools.description: List the recorded observations for a drift monitor via /api/v1/drift-monitors/{driftMonitorId}/observations. Requires artifact_bundles:read (or artifacts:pull) for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_run_drift_check
tools.description: Queue a drift check immediately instead of waiting for the monitor's schedule, via POST /api/v1/drift-monitors/{driftMonitorId}/check. The first check on a new monitor calibrates its baseline. Costs one audit per repeat. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_set_drift_monitor_status
tools.description: Pause or resume a drift monitor via PATCH /api/v1/drift-monitors/{driftMonitorId}. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_record_outcome
tools.description: Record a production outcome event (input feature, metric, and/or label) for an artifact bundle via POST /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/outcomes. Requires artifact_bundles:write for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_input_drift
tools.description: Compare recent production inputs against a prior reference window (population stability index) for an artifact bundle via GET /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/drift/input. Requires artifact_bundles:read (or artifacts:pull) for API keys.

tools.name: rubrkit_read_validity_drift
tools.description: Correlate rubric scores against recorded outcome metrics for an artifact bundle to check whether the rubric is still predictive via GET /api/v1/artifact-bundles/{artifactBundleId}/drift/validity. Requires artifact_bundles:read (or artifacts:pull) for API keys.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: rubrkit_run_drift_check · Private data: rubrkit_read_api_doc, rubrkit_create_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_list_artifact_bundles, rubrkit_read_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_hard_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_upload_artifact_files, rubrkit_list_artifact_files, rubrkit_read_artifact_file, rubrkit_update_artifact_file, rubrkit_start_audit, rubrkit_list_audits, rubrkit_read_audit, rubrkit_apply_audit_rewrite, rubrkit_convert_to_rubr_flow, rubrkit_list_rubr_flow_conversions, rubrkit_read_rubr_flow_conversion, rubrkit_poll_job, rubrkit_list_job_events, rubrkit_list_artifact_bundle_versions, rubrkit_restore_artifact_bundle_version, rubrkit_list_file_versions, rubrkit_restore_file_version, rubrkit_run_evals, rubrkit_list_evals, rubrkit_read_eval, rubrkit_export_proof_report, rubrkit_read_proof_report, rubrkit_list_golden_cases, rubrkit_add_golden_case, rubrkit_retire_golden_case, rubrkit_create_drift_monitor, rubrkit_list_drift_monitors, rubrkit_read_drift_observations, rubrkit_run_drift_check, rubrkit_set_drift_monitor_status, rubrkit_record_outcome, rubrkit_read_input_drift, rubrkit_read_validity_drift · Public sink: rubrkit_upload_artifact_files, rubrkit_add_golden_case, rubrkit_create_drift_monitor, rubrkit_run_drift_check, rubrkit_record_outcome · Destructive: rubrkit_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_hard_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_start_audit, rubrkit_read_audit, rubrkit_apply_audit_rewrite, rubrkit_run_evals, rubrkit_list_evals, rubrkit_read_eval, rubrkit_export_proof_report, rubrkit_retire_golden_case, rubrkit_run_drift_check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: rubrkit_run_drift_check · Private data: rubrkit_read_api_doc, rubrkit_create_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_list_artifact_bundles, rubrkit_read_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_hard_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_upload_artifact_files, rubrkit_list_artifact_files, rubrkit_read_artifact_file, rubrkit_update_artifact_file, rubrkit_start_audit, rubrkit_list_audits, rubrkit_read_audit, rubrkit_apply_audit_rewrite, rubrkit_convert_to_rubr_flow, rubrkit_list_rubr_flow_conversions, rubrkit_read_rubr_flow_conversion, rubrkit_poll_job, rubrkit_list_job_events, rubrkit_list_artifact_bundle_versions, rubrkit_restore_artifact_bundle_version, rubrkit_list_file_versions, rubrkit_restore_file_version, rubrkit_run_evals, rubrkit_list_evals, rubrkit_read_eval, rubrkit_export_proof_report, rubrkit_read_proof_report, rubrkit_list_golden_cases, rubrkit_add_golden_case, rubrkit_retire_golden_case, rubrkit_create_drift_monitor, rubrkit_list_drift_monitors, rubrkit_read_drift_observations, rubrkit_run_drift_check, rubrkit_set_drift_monitor_status, rubrkit_record_outcome, rubrkit_read_input_drift, rubrkit_read_validity_drift · Public sink: rubrkit_upload_artifact_files, rubrkit_add_golden_case, rubrkit_create_drift_monitor, rubrkit_run_drift_check, rubrkit_record_outcome · Destructive: rubrkit_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_hard_delete_artifact_bundle, rubrkit_start_audit, rubrkit_read_audit, rubrkit_apply_audit_rewrite, rubrkit_run_evals, rubrkit_list_evals, rubrkit_read_eval, rubrkit_export_proof_report, rubrkit_retire_golden_case, rubrkit_run_drift_check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
